name: build-package-pcf
description: Design, implement, review, troubleshoot, test, optimize, and package production-grade Microsoft Power Apps Component Framework components.

interface.shortDescription: Engineer production-grade Power Apps PCF components.
interface.longDescription: Design, scaffold, implement, review, troubleshoot, test, optimize, version, and package field or dataset PCF controls using standard DOM or React virtual architectures.
defaultPrompt: Design and build a production-grade PCF control.
Review this PCF component against Microsoft guidance.
Diagnose, test, and package this PCF project.
